fixes.origin:
cmd = f"ffprobe -v error \"{src}\""
p = subprocess.Popen(cmd, shell=True, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE, text=True)
fixes.replacement: p = subprocess.Popen(["ffprobe", "-v", "error", src], shell=False, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE, text=True)

static_findings.message: subprocess execution may allow OS command injection if input is not controlled.
